2004.issue: [E2004] Version "7.0.0" listed at common.news at [io-package.json](https://github.com/hombach/ioBroker.tibberlink/blob/master/io-package.json) does not exist at [NPM](https://www.npmjs.com/package/iobroker.tibberlink). Please remove from news section.

5004.issue: [S5004] Plain setInterval() found in source files (src/lib/tibberLocal.ts). Please use this.setInterval() or adapter.setInterval() instead.

5054.issue: [S5054] method "setObject()" should be avoided. Please use "setObjectNotExists()" or "extendObject()" instead.
